# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Meets City Backdrop Upgrade
- Summary: Show how CodeGrind's AI assistant aids problem-solving alongside the refreshed city backdrop and city map components—illustrating a more immersive learning loop.
- Slug: codegrind-dsai-assistant-and-city-backdrop
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsai-assistant-and-city-backdrop
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-30-codegrind-dsai-assistant-and-city-backdrop.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now pairs Azure OpenAI-powered problem-solving guidance with the updated cyberpunk city backdrop, enhanced city map and improved scene management to create a more engaging DSA practice experience.
- CTA: Try a guided problem session with the AI assistant and explore the new City backdrop and Map features in CodeGrind.
- Visual brief: A short, cinematic demo: split-screen or overlay showing the AI assistant responding to a coding prompt on the left and the cyberpunk city backdrop with the CityMap in motion on the right. Include subtle UI elements: code editor, problem description, AI chat, and a circling highlight around a skyline or tower visualizing problem-solving steps. End with a CTA screen: ‘Practice with AI • Explore City Backdrop’.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
